results.rendered_html:
anuyojya (wie eben) adj.
a〉 anzuweisen, zu Jmdes Befehlen stehend: ubhābhyāmapi vāsavānuyojyo duṣyantaḥ praṇamati  ŚĀK. 109,16 .
— b〉 zu befragen: mamedamiti yo brūyātso 'nuyojyo yathāvidhi  M. 8,31 .

results.rendered_html:
anuyojya pot. p. Fit to be questioned, asked; asked with a reproof.
— jyaḥ A servant; obedient and humble servant; ubhābhyāmapi vāsavānuyojyo duṣyaṃtaḥ praṇamati  Ś. 7 ;  Ms. 8. 31.
